cpu: AMD A8-6500 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: Debian Testing: Performance is great, no crashes, no visual glitches, played using mouse and keyboard (controller support not tested).
title: Strange Telephone

cpu: AMD A8-6500 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: Game played and beaten from start to finish with no issues. Played using mouse and keyboard (controller support not tested).
title: Strange Telephone

notes: While the game does run, it is impossible to change the language setting to English. Menu dialog options display no descriptive text as to what they do (Just has text like, "Dialog_confirm - dialog_select YES NO"). Found it impossible to parse so unless you're lucky like the other reporters I'm going to have rate it bronze. Attempted all the Proton versions currently available at the time of writing as well as several tweaks, all  seemingly with no effect.
title: Strange Telephone
